入手方法: イベント: Bonus Pick - Lightning Type Pokemon Mass Outbreak
イベント: Rare Pick - Lightning Type Pokemon Mass Outbreak

カードの効果.発動効果: Move all [Lightning] Energy from your Benched Pokémon to your Raichu, Electrode, or Electabuzz in the Active Spot.
カードの効果.追加ルール: You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.
